race.comment: HIDDEN FUTURE (9) didn't measure up in G3 company last time out but will find this contest much more to her liking. Strips fitter third-up from the break and should get a cosy run in transit from gate two. Rates the testing material. URBAN LAD (4) may have suffered from the dreaded second-up syndrome last time out but go on the solid win over this track and trip when resuming. Can bounce right back. AVE CANTARE (7) has hit the top-four in five of six outings this preparation and rarely puts in a poor one. A must for the exotics players from the inside marble. ALL TOO FOXY (10) was a good winner last start and deserves respect.
